div1.entryFree: Between, adv., in the same sense: these shrugs, when you have said 'she's goodly' come b., ere you can say 'she's honest', Wint. II, 1, 75. as you had slept b. IV, 1, 17. the river hath thrice flowed, no ebb b. H4B IV, 4, 125. no impediment b. Cor. II, 3, 236. a more unhappy lady ne'er stood b. Ant. III, 4, 13. come you b., and save poor me, Per. IV, 1, 90. else he never would compare b. R2 II, 1, 185. gone b. and b. Troil. I, 1, 72. cf. Goer-between, Broker-between.
